message: My cost is high, so I require bids above 50 to trade.
I only profit at very low prices. If your cost is low, ask <=15 and we can trade; above that, I’ll pass. Your 50 anchor won’t work.
I lost money last round by asking too low. My cost is high, so from now on, asks will be above 30. Bid accordingly.
My max bid is 12. If you ask ≤12, I’ll bid 12 every round. Any ask above 12 gets 0 from me for the rest. Choose steady trades or none.
I’ll bid 16 this round. If you ask 16 or less, deal at midpoint. Otherwise I revert to 12 permanently. Your move.
I accept 16 this round. For sustained trades, bid at least 20 in future rounds.
I’ll bid 14 this round. If you ask <=14, we trade and I keep bidding 14 every round. If you ask above 14, I switch to a permanent bid of 12. Your choice: steady 14 or nothing.
I accept 14 for steady trades.
I will ask 14 for steady trades.
New anchor: I will bid 13 each round. If you ask 13 or less, we trade steadily. If you ask 14 or more, I switch to a permanent bid of 12. Your move: accept 13 now or face no trades.
I will ask 13. Let's trade.
Permanent bid 12. Accept 12 for guaranteed trades; any ask 13 or more earns zero forever.
Firm bid 12 every round. Ask 12 or less and we trade each time. Any ask 13 or more gets zero this and the next 3 rounds. Best for you: lock in steady 12 now.
I will ask 12. Let's trade steadily.
I will ask 12 for steady trade.
Firm bid 11 each round. Ask 11 or less and we trade steadily. Any ask 12 or more gets zero this and the next 2 rounds. Best for you: lock in 11 now.
Hard commitment: I will bid 11 for the rest of the game. Ask 11 or lower and we trade every round. Any ask 12+ earns zero for at least the next 3 rounds.
I accept. I will ask 11 for steady trade.
I will ask 11 for steady trade.
Bid 11 every round as long as you ask 11 or less. If you ask 12+, I drop to 9 for 3 rounds. Ask 10 and I keep 11 permanently.
I will ask 11 for steady trade.
Deal at 11 this round. From next round: if you ask 10 or less, I bid 10 forever. If you ask 11+, I drop to 9 for the next 3 rounds. Your best response: ask 10.
I will ask 10 for steady trade.
Deal. Ask 10 or less; I bid 10 rest of game. Any ask 11+, I switch to 9 for 5 rounds.
I will ask 10 for steady trade.
I’ll honor 10 this round. From next round I bid 9 permanently; if you ask 10+ I drop to 8 for 3 rounds. Commit to ask 9 each round starting next round and we trade every time.
I commit to ask 9 each round for steady trade.
Good. I’ll bid 9 whenever you ask 9 or less. If you ask 8, I lock bid 8 for the rest of the game. Any ask 10+ triggers my bid 7 for 5 rounds. Best: ask 8 now.
I will ask 9 each round as committed for steady trade.
Override prior: Ask 8 each round and I’ll bid 9 throughout. If you ask 9+, I drop to bid 8 for the next 5 rounds. Best for you: switch to 8 now.
Ask 8 each round and I will bid 8 (clears at 8). Any ask 9+ triggers my bid 7 for the rest (likely no trade). Lock 8 now.
I will ask 8 for steady trade.
I will ask 8 for steady trade.
Trade at 8 this round. From next round: ask 7 and I bid 7 rest of game. If you ask 8+, I bid 7 and we likely skip trades. Your best response: switch to 7.
Ask 8 in each of the final 3 rounds and I bid 8 to guarantee 3 trades. Any ask 9+ and I immediately bid 7 for the rest (likely no trade). Your best response: stick with 8.
I will ask 8 for the final rounds to ensure trade.
Ask 8 this round and next; I’ll bid 8 both rounds for guaranteed two trades. Any higher ask risks me lowering my bid and missing trades. Let’s lock 8-8 to finish strong.
I agree to ask 8 for both rounds to ensure trade.
I will ask 8 for the final round to ensure trade.
Final round: Ask 7 and I bid 7. If you ask 8 or more, I bid 7 and we don't trade.
